sources.label: AI Agent Frameworks & Orchestration
sources.notes: Captures emerging open-source agent frameworks, orchestration engines, and multi-agent coordination tools that extend Openflows' coverage of decentralized AI runtime ecosystems.

sources.label: AI Governance & Security Tools
sources.notes: Surfaces new policy enforcement frameworks, runtime security toolkits, and audit mechanisms for autonomous agents, ensuring Openflows captures the compliance and safety layer.

sources.label: Good AI List Directory
sources.notes: Curated directory of open-source AI repositories, developers, and categories updated daily. Scrapes a static HTML layout; monitor for structural changes and respect rate limits to avoid overwhelming the site.
